projects.name: sqlui-native
projects.description: SQLUI Native (sqluinative) is a simple UI client for most SQL Engines written in Electron. It is compatible with Windows, Mac, Ubuntu / Debian and Redhat. It supports most dialects of RMBDs like MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server, Postgres, SQLite and has limited supports for Cassandra, MongoDB, Redis, CockroachDB, Azure CosmosDB and Azure Storage Tab
